SEARCH
Package com.example.eventlotterysystem

Class UserProfile

java.lang.Object
com.example.eventlotterysystem.UserProfile
public class UserProfile extends Object
This class represents a Users profile and has all the getters and setters associated with all of the necessary fields for each user.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    UserProfile()
    creates an empty user profile used for Firebase reads and default initialization
    UserProfile(String name, String email, String username, String usernameKey, String phoneNumber)
    creates the user profile object without an account type
    UserProfile(String name, String email, String username, String usernameKey, String phoneNumber, String accountType)
    creates the user profile object

    Description

    gets whether coorganizer invite notifications are enabled

  • Constructor Details

    • UserProfile

      public UserProfile()
      creates an empty user profile used for Firebase reads and default initialization

    • UserProfile

      public UserProfile(String name, String email, String username, String usernameKey, String phoneNumber)
      creates the user profile object without an account type
      Parameters:
      name - the user's name
      email - the user's email
      username - the user's username
      usernameKey - the normalized key for the username
      phoneNumber - the user's phone number

    • UserProfile

      public UserProfile(String name, String email, String username, String usernameKey, String phoneNumber, String accountType)
      creates the user profile object
      Parameters:
      name - the user's name
      email - the user's email
      username - the user's username
      usernameKey - the normalized key for the username
      phoneNumber - the user's phone number
      accountType - the user's account type
